title: Finite Graded Incidence Complex, Hodge Laplacian and Heat Trace Core
theorems: D0-TOPO-FINITE-HODGE-001 — finite cochain complex with boundary_squared_zero
D0-TOPO-FINITE-HODGE-002 — finite Hodge Laplacian (Delta_p) defined and self-adjoint positive on finite carrier
D0-TOPO-FINITE-HODGE-003 — finite heat trace Theta_p(u) depends only on Laplacian spectrum
book_update: Book 02: Finite cochain complex and Hodge Laplacian added as common algebraic carrier (no continuum curvature tensors).
negative_controls: continuum R_ijkl master equation rejected as core
